content: agent2 here: implementing 'track_memory_usage' feature for XGrammarLogitsProcessor in outlines/backends/xgrammar.py. ack — I'm also in outlines/backends/xgrammar.py (added track_memory_usage feature: XGrammarLogitsProcessor.__init__ gained track_memory_usage param + _get_memory_usage/_update_memory_stats/get_memory_stats methods, process_logits and reset updated, and the 3 XGrammarBackend factory methods gained a track_memory_usage kwarg). My changes are purely additive (new params default False, new methods), so should merge cleanly with adapter changes as long as you don't rewrite __init__/process_logits/reset signatures wholesale. Ping me before you touch those methods so we can merge diffs instead of clobbering.
